text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Mornin', everyone! Let's get this party started!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Thought I'd drop by on my day off to watch some
races! Running freestyle races is great, but
watching them's the best too!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
Freestyle racers hold themselves with so much
pride...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text: Just watching them makes me wanna run!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Palmer
text_block_list.text:
I'm so fired up now, I think I'm gonna cut loose on
the track today! Let's have a good one, everyone!
